description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a dark gray metallic finish and a minimalist design. The lid features a prominent, glossy black Apple logo centered on the back, indicating it is a MacBook. The keyboard is full-sized with a QWERTY layout, black keys, and a large trackpad below. The screen is open and displays a user interface with various windows and icons, suggesting the device is powered on and in use. The sides of the laptop show a slim profile with visible ports, likely USB-C, and a headphone jack. The overall build appears sturdy and premium, with smooth, hard surfaces and a refined appearance.
description: A modern, dark gray MacBook laptop with a black Apple logo, full keyboard, and open, active screen. The design is slim, metallic, and visually refined.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the slim profile, keyboard, and visible ports.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the closed lid with a centered black Apple logo.
description_view_2: Right side view highlighting the thinness and keyboard layout.
description_view_3: Front view showing the open screen with visible interface, keyboard, and trackpad.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the lid, glossy and easily recognizable.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying an application window and desktop interface.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad, and standard MacBook key arrangement.
